input_dict.question: What was Robert Tree Cody's adopted father's most prominent PSA role?
input_dict.source_summary: Robert Tree Cody's adopted father, Iron Eyes Cody, was best known for appearing as the tear‑shedding Native American in the Keep America Beautiful television PSA (the well‑known "Crying Indian" advertisement).
input_dict.target_summary: Robert Tree Cody is an adopted son of Hollywood actor Iron Eyes Cody. Iron Eyes Cody "played a Native American shedding a tear about litter in one of the country's most well-known television PSAs, 'Keep America Beautiful'."
input_dict.candidate_summary: Robert Tree Cody is an adopted son of Hollywood actor Iron Eyes Cody. Iron Eyes Cody "played a Native American shedding a tear about litter in one of the country's most well-known television PSAs, 'Keep America Beautiful'."
